typo3/cms.name: typo3/cms
typo3/cms.description: TYPO3 CMS is a free open source Content Management Framework initially created by Kasper Skaarhoj and licensed under GNU/GPL.

suggest.ext-apcu: Needed when non-default APCU based cache backends are used
suggest.ext-exif: Used to extract exif metadata (orientation) of uploaded images
suggest.ext-fileinfo: Used for proper file type detection in the file abstraction layer
suggest.ext-gd: GDlib/Freetype is required for building images with text (GIFBUILDER) and can also be used to scale images
suggest.ext-openssl: OpenSSL is required for sending SMTP mails over an encrypted channel endpoint
suggest.ext-zlib: TYPO3 uses zlib for amongst others output compression and un/packing t3x extension files
